rfps.title: RFP - Cybersecurity Risk Assessment

rfps.title: RFP for Agri AI Collect Deployment in Kharif 2026-2027
rfps.reason: LEHS seeks AI-powered agricultural data collection for Kharif 2026-2027; Dhwani excels in mobile data collection (mForm) and agricultural MIS but the RFP's emphasis on AI/ML solutions is not a core Dhwani strength, requiring significant custom development.

rfps.reason: RFP requires multilingual data collection services for an agricultural AI model—mForm fits the data collection need, but the core requirement (image-to-text extraction ML model) is outside Dhwani's primary expertise; however, Dhwani can be positioned as the data collection and field validation layer for Wadhwani AI's model.
